title: Short title
doc_html:
PART V-A.  LICENSING OF ADULT RESIDENTIAL CARE PROVIDERS

§2166.1.  Short title

This Part may be cited as the "Adult Residential Care Provider Licensing Law".

Acts 2006, No. 433, §1, eff. June 15, 2006.
